Add this many seconds of overlap to avoi: صفحہ حدود پر خلا سے بچنے کے لیے اتنے سیکنڈ کا اوورلیپ شامل کریں۔
Apply this history window to every selec: Apply this history window to every selected Fleet Trend chart.
BM200, BM200 Pro, BM300, and BM300 Pro a: BM200, BM200 Pro, BM300, and BM300 Pro app families all expose lead-acid and lithium setup paths. Lead-acid supports regular, AGM, EFB, GEL, and custom. Lithium supports lithium and custom. Custom profiles can use the intelligent algorithm or a voltage-to-SoC curve. The gateway now generates the device ID automatically and assigns the visual badges from the battery and vehicle metadata you choose below.
BM200/BM6 protocol state order: Critical: BM200/BM6 protocol state order: Critical, Low, Normal, Charging, Floating. Current state: Normal.
Enable periodic onboard history import: باقاعدہ آن بورڈ ہسٹری درآمد فعال کریں
Imports dense supported-device history p: معاون ڈیوائسز کی تفصیلی ہسٹری باقاعدگی سے اور طویل آف لائن وقفوں کے بعد درآمد کرتا ہے۔
Enable BM300 Pro/BM7 history import: BM300 Pro/BM7 ہسٹری درآمد فعال کریں
Keep BM300 Pro/BM7 archive imports separ: BM300 Pro/BM7 آرکائیو درآمد کو الگ فعال رکھیں۔
Caps each automatic or manual BM300 Pro/: ہر خودکار یا دستی BM300 Pro/BM7 ہسٹری سنک کو محدود کرتا ہے۔ مقررہ زیادہ سے زیادہ حد مشاہدہ شدہ 883 ریکارڈ سلیکٹر ونڈو اور مشتہر کردہ 72 دن کی ریٹینشن پر مبنی ہے۔
Caps each automatic or manual BM200/BM6: ہر خودکار یا دستی BM200/BM6 ہسٹری سنک کو محدود کرتا ہے۔ ایک صفحہ تقریبا 8 گھنٹے 32 منٹ ہے۔
Choose how many batteries can appear on: Choose how many batteries can appear on one overview image.
Choose how many monitored batteries stay: Choose how many monitored batteries stay visible before the overview pages horizontally on larger fleets.
Choose live to read real devices over Bl: Choose live to read real devices over Bluetooth, or fake for offline UI testing.
Choose the language used by the local we: Choose the language used by the local web interface.
Choose the light or dark visual style fo: Choose the light or dark visual style for generated frame images.

Choose which network interface the web s: Choose which network interface the web server listens on, for example 0.0.0.0 or 127.0.0.1.

Controls how long the gateway searches f: Controls how long the gateway searches for each Bluetooth device before giving up.
Controls how long the gateway waits for: Controls how long the gateway waits for a Bluetooth connection to complete.

Expose generated frame images through a: Expose generated frame images through a Raspberry Pi USB gadget mass storage drive. This remains inactive until the USB gadget hardware path is available.

Keeps the last known gateway and battery: Keeps the last known gateway and battery state on the broker for new subscribers.

The web interface will stop responding o: The web interface will stop responding once the host powers off. Start it again by reconnecting power.
